name: tpi-channel-azure
description: Azure-channel index. Same 16 ATPI members, selectors restricted to hyperscaler='azure' (Azure OpenAI Service + Azure AI Foundry). 8 of ATPI's 16 members resolve here — the 4 OpenAI GPT-5.x models (Azure OpenAI's exclusive cloud channel), the 3 Anthropic Claude models (now offered through Azure AI Foundry), and Mistral Large 3. The 8 unresolved members are Google Gemini, GLM, Kimi, Grok, Qwen Plus, MiniMax, and DeepSeek — none yet on Azure cloud channels.
selection_rule: ATPI 16 members, hyperscaler == 'azure' filter (first matching record per family)

members.label: Gemini 2.5 Pro
